content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be structured as a neurally embodied episodic library where curiosity-driven active sample selection prioritizes encoding high-uncertainty episodes that directly improve future episodic planning, turning active memory update into a bootstrapping cycle for planning capability. This framework replaces generic memory pruning with episode selection guided by the same curiosity signal that drives active learning, tying memory growth directly to planning performance gains.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
